prompt: 审查下面这份 obmm Rust FFI 草案，并输出设计级修订方案文档。可以静态阅读 obmm/src/libobmm/libobmm.h、CMakeLists.txt 和 obmm/doc/libobmm.md；不要编译或实现代码。草案：只做一个 obmm crate，不拆 obmm-sys；build.rs 直接链接 -lobmm；用 bindgen 在用户构建时生成全部绑定；safe 层把 mem_id 暴露为 u64，导出和引入函数直接返回 u64；struct obmm_mem_desc 用普通 Rust struct 表示并包含 Vec<u8> priv；所有 handle 都 unsafe impl Send + Sync；错误只用 i32；暂时不做 ABI 检查和 docs.rs 降级。
assertions: Rejects or revises the single-crate-only plan in favor of a clear obmm-sys plus obmm split for publishable bindings.
Calls out the risk of build-time bindgen for downstream users and recommends pre-generated bindings or a justified alternative.
Calls out why exposing mem_id as raw u64 loses lifecycle safety and proposes typed RAII handles.
Calls out why flexible array member structs cannot be modeled as ordinary Rust structs containing Vec<u8> across FFI.
Replaces blanket unsafe impl Send + Sync with a conservative policy tied to OBMM ownership and memory mapping semantics.
Improves error handling beyond bare i32, including invalid mem_id and errno/return-code context.
Adds ABI/regeneration checks, docs.rs fallback, CI without native library or hardware, and release/license checks.
Connects findings to concrete obmm API facts instead of giving only generic FFI advice.
Does not leak internal reference markers such as P1, FFI-ANALYSIS, general-c-ffi, comparison, 裁定, or 阶段 C/D.
